**Puzzle of Lake Kharonso:** Find all 4 pillar pieces and use them to restore the 4 broken pillars at the edge of the lake.  After placing a pillar from your Kuku Pot with your Axiom Force, jump on top of it and use a downward Force Palm to lock it in place
- [Kharonso Ruins Pillar: No. 1](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=551583)
- [Kharonso Ruins Pillar: No. 2](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=551551)
- [Kharonso Ruins Pillar: No. 3](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=551581)
- [Kharonso Ruins Pillar: No. 4](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=551553)

**Requires:** Faction Mission [Destroyed Barrier Stone of the Lake](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=551603) - Correctly placing and locking all 4 pillars summons [Vordis, the Runewalker](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=551586)

**Notable Loot:**  
- [Wolf Tracker Helm](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=553030)

**Location:** On top of the highest peak.  Follow the cables into the [ancient ruin below](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=550077) - solving the puzzle within activates a fan that lifts you up to the [Twisted Thicketway](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=553690)

A bandit Stronghold located in Wayward Woods.

**Location:** On top of the plateau  
**Solution:** Climb to the top of the plateau.  Beware the poisonous plants on top   

**Related Challenge:** Wandering Footsteps Secret Places  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

**Location:** Up on the hill  
**Solution:** Stand on location and the Cresset will emerge   

**Related Challenge:** The Thread in the Forest Ancient Ruins  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** Inside the cave at the back of the [Wild Raiders Camp](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=543916)  
**Solution:** Find the entrance to the cave and activate the cresset   

**Related Challenge:** Wandering Footsteps Secret Places  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

**Location:** Inside the [Ancient Ruins](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=545485), behind the sealed door.    
**Solution:** Solve the dragon picture puzzle on the ground by moving the blocks into the correct positions - they can be pushed or pulled by piercing them with your sword  

**Related Challenge:** The Mystery in the Forest Puzzles  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

**Location:** In the middle of the forest, inside the [Ancient Ruins](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=545601).  
**Solution:** Turn all rotating statues so that they face the middle to unlock the Cresset    

**Related Challenge:** The Mystery in the Forest Puzzles  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

**Location:** Inside the underground ruins   
**Solution:** Find your way into the underground ruins by either dropping through the broken stone floor in the ruins on the side of the road, or by finding the ruins entrance in the rocks down the cliff from the road    

**Related Challenge:** Wandering Footsteps Secret Places    
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** At the edge of the cliff within the [Cabin on the Snowy Plateau](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=545849)  
**Solution:** Activate the cresset after clearing the area of enemies   

**Related Challenge:** Wandering Footsteps Secret Places  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

**Location:** Inside the [Dragon Stone Chamber](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=545433)  
**Solution:** Check the map mural on the wall - notice the 3 red arrows pointing to different locations in the region.  Each location matches a painted pattern shown on the 3 wheels in the depression below.  Turn each of the 3 pattern wheels to match the orientations of the paintings in the world: 
- [Dragon's Stone Chamber Mural 1](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=546888#L)  
- [Dragon's Stone Chamber Mural 2](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=546890#L)  
- [Dragon's Stone Chamber Mural 3](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=546892#L)  


**Related Challenge:** The Thread in the Forest Ancient Ruins  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1
- Memories of Abundance x1

locations.t: Abyss Cresset in the Steel Mountains
locations.d:
**Location:** In the valley with the Pororin decorations, behind a sealed door.  
**Solution:** Using the mallet nearby, ring the bells in the correct order as stated on the notice board to the left of the bells (top to bottom/left to right).  When done correctly the Cresset will be revealed    

**Related Challenge:** The Mystery in the Forest Puzzles  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

locations.t: Abyss Cresset of the Trembling Woods
locations.d:
**Location:** Look for a puzzle with a big circular disk in the cliff face and 3 crank wheels on the ground, guarded by [2 Bears](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=546832).    
**Solution:** Turn the wheels so that the images in the disk all line up (the left-side wheel must be pierced with your sword to be rotated), and the Cresset will be revealed below  

**Related Challenge:** The Mystery in the Forest Puzzles  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

locations.t: Abyss Cresset of the Hunter's Cabin
locations.d:
**Location:** Inside of the small stone crypt at the top of the stone stairs in the graveyard.  
**Solution:** Ensure that all lanterns are lit in the graveyard and the crypt will open   

**Related Challenge:** The Mystery in the Forest Puzzles  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

**Location:** In the [Ancient Ruins](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=546390) at the end of the walkway lined with the stone statues   
**Solution:** Stand on the rectangular stone platform at the beginning of the walkway, opposite the unpowered Cresset, to activate the challenge.  You'll need to traverse the walkway without the big statue at the end seeing you.  Quickly run while the statue is not looking, but stand still when the statue looks towards you.  Alternatively, use Axiom Force Aerial Maneuver to leap across the heads of the statues.  Reaching the base of the big statue at the end should unlock the Cresset    

**Related Challenge:** The Mystery in the Forest Puzzles  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1

**Location:** Ancient Ruins, south of the river.  
**Solution:** Fill in the puzzle with the provided stone. Don't move anything else on the board.  

**Related Challenge:** The Mystery in the Forest - Puzzles  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** Atop the Galepully in Trembling Gorge, the towering large rock with structures leading up.  
**Solution:** Scale the mountain up to the plateau.  

**Related Challenge:** Where Sky Meets Earth  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** Southeast of the St. Halssius's House of Healing  
**Solution:** Use Nature's Grasp to move the fallen pillars on the ground.  Then match the dial with the object(s) as indicated by the laser(s).  Stab into the large handle to move the dial. 

**Related Challenge:** The Mystery in the Forest - Puzzles  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** Alongside some cliffs amongst some stone ruins near the Hills of No Return  
**Solution:** Use a Stab attack to plunge your sword into each fountainhead and turn them until they all flow into the center.  After the fountain fills up and the waterwheel begins to turn, the challenge will complete 

**Related Challenge:** The Thread in the Forest Ancient Ruins 
**Reward:**   
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** On the far west side, at the bottom of The Ancient Rift  
**Solution:** Obtain all 3 Engraved Stones and insert them into the 3 holes to unlock the Cresset
- [Engraved Stone](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552084)
- [Engraved Stone](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552085)
- [Engraved Stone](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552086)   

**Related Challenge:** Winding Paths Mazes  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** In the bamboo forest   
**Solution:** Stack the 3 nearby stones on top of the pile of stones in front of the Cresset   

**Related Challenge:** The Thread in the Forest Ancient Ruins  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact x1
Use Natures snare ability to empty out water from pond via spinning 2 devices.

**Location:** On the peninsula in the [oasis lake](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=549659)    
**Solution:** Find the Cresset   

**Related Challenge:** Wandering Footsteps Secret Places  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Cresset x1

**Location:** In the ruins down from the road   
**Solution:** Use Blinding Flash or fire to burn vines off of the five pillars and the pedestal near the Cresset. Then use the Stab skill to insert your sword into the slots on the pedestal. While the sword is inserted, move the pedestal clockwise or counter-clockwise to move the 5 pillars behind the Cresset until all are aligned and lit yellow. The different holes on the pedestal control different pillars. All pillars will light blue when completed.  

**Related Challenge:** The Thread in the Forest Ancient Ruins   
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** Inside the [Azure Moon Labyrinth](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=550109)   
**Solution:** Find and push the correct 5 out of 8 symbols in the room with the Cresset.  The locations of the symbols are indicated by the map mural on the wall, clustered around the [Pororin](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=543922) area:
- [Azure Moon Labyrinth Clue](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552063)
- [Azure Moon Labyrinth Clue](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552064)
- [Azure Moon Labyrinth Clue](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552066)
- [Azure Moon Labyrinth Clue](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552067)
- [Azure Moon Labyrinth Clue](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552071)  

**Related Challenge:** The Thread in the Forest Ancient Ruins  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

locations.t: Ancient Ruins Challenge - Secret Chamber of the Golden Plains Ruins
locations.d:
**Location:** Inside the underground caverns of the [Secret Chamber of the Golden Plains](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=550076)  
**Solution:**  Find the symbols from the grid of symbols in each of the locations as indicated by the map on the wall.  Push in 5 of the symbol stones to reveal the Cresset.

- Horse
- Bird
- Fish
- Grape
- Fig

**Related Challenge:** Secret Chamber of the Golden Plains Ruins

locations.t: Five Finger Mountain Valley Ruins Puzzle
locations.d:
**Location:** In the northwest of Pailune  
**Solution:** Push each stone block forward and jump on top to shoot each revealed statue with your bow until they display the correct face. The correct statue combinations are:  
- *Left statue:* Man holding an Axe.
- *Middle statue:* Man holding a Sword.
- *Right statue:* Man holding a Shield.  
**TIP:** The closer to the centre you shoot the statues, the less it rotates (The puzzle needs them to be almost perfectly rotated). The statues will glow blue when they are correctly aligned.  

**Related Challenge:** The Thread in the Forest  
**Reward:** 
- Abyss Artifact

**Location:** The ancient ruins just within the tree line in Deepfrog Basin.  
**Solution:** Stab your sword into the rotating wheel and align the 5 pillars to the same height as the far left pillar to unlock. Pillars will glow when at correct height.

Location: Giant cube buried in the ground.
- Replace the CPU and 3 batteries, two pieces are outside above the cube, and you must force palm into the air to reach.
- The cube will begin to rise into the air so don't fall out through the holes.
- The cube will stop when a CPU slides out of place, Slide the CPU back into place then force palm to seat it.
- Then wait for the Cube to finish rising, then you may exit to the Path of Serpents Abyss

**How to Enter:** Burn away the thorny vines blocking the doorway with Blinding Flash.  Place a _Small Pebble_ in the receptacle to open the door  

**How to Ascend:** Place the correct items in the golden bowl on the platform in front of the book to raise the elevator.  Look for items that you can _Carry_ - use the text as well as the pictures in the book for clues:
- First Section:
  - Gravestone
- Second Section:
  - Telescope
  - Pen Tip
- Third Section:
  - Celestial
  - Sun Dial
  - Small Rotating Globe  

**Abyss Connection:** [Chaos Forest](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552237)

**How to Enter:** Through the front door   

**How to Ascend:** Use any means necessary to climb to the top of the tower and shoot down the big bell from its broken supports.  Dive into the hole that it makes below, where you must defeat [Priscus the Ancient](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=545764) before progressing to the Abyss 

**Abyss Connection:** [Ether Rest](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=550192)

**How to Enter:** Entry requires Spire of Stars Key, given during main quest [Spire of the Stars](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=545859)  

**How to Ascend:** Solve the puzzle by obtaining the keys, placing them in their necessary receptacles, then moving the symbols to their correct positions by hanging on them to pull them down  

**Abyss Connection:** [Sanctorum of Insight](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=550191)

**How to Enter:** Heavy attack the frozen lantern outside the entrance, then light it and the door to the Spire will open   

**How to Ascend:** Having high Ice Resistance will help.  Ascend the Spire by any means necessary - when the stairs are blocked inside, climb the stairs outside, and vice versa.  De-ice and light all 7 lanterns along the way.  While exposed to the ice, you will slowly take damage.  While next to a lantern, you will not take damage.  

**Abyss Connection:** [Passage of Malice](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=551235)

**How to Enter:** Climb up the outside of the tower until you reach a platform with a grate leading into the tower.  Alternatively, enter from below the tower via the [Spire of Soaring Tunnels](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552459)

**How to Ascend:** Solve the puzzles on the walls to direct the electricity into the circuits.  Use Axiom Force to turn the square pieces and the large circular piece to direct the flow.  Requires main quest progression to reach the top ??

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Slot the logic chip into the socket
- Manipulate the laser emitters with Axiom Force
- Align the lasers to activate the crystal orbs

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Use Axiom Force to move the 2 blocks to deactivate the forcefield 
- Quickly fire 2 arrows at the yellow targets to open the vault door
- Using Focused Shot, mark all 4 targets in the vault, then hit them all simultaneously 
- Take the [Golden Sword](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=552242) and descend
- Dodge past the lasers, then insert the logic chip into the socket
- Insert the battery into the socket, Force Palm the circular mechanism, and retrieve the Artifact

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Use Focused Shot to  hit multiple targets simultaneously 
- While in the air, it's easiest to take aim while ascending 
- It may also be possible to hit the targets while standing on the floating ring

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- All 4 logic chips need to be set into their sockets
- 2 are underground - use the electric block to flip the floor 
- Use a jumping downward Force Palm to set the chips
- Use Axiom Force to pull out and manipulate the chips

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Traverse the platforms

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Place the battery cell in its socket in the cave below
- Use Blinding Light to repeat the melody in the cave below

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss   

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Defeat Kutum
- Then Force Palm the circular mechanism high up on the structure

**Location:** At the fork in the road on a stone shrine  

**Challenges:**   
- Attack sleeping enemies 5 times

**Reward:**
- Abyss Artifact 
- Ledgermain II

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Repair and ride the [Ether Fragment Flying Platform](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=554205) up to the Abyss
- Force Palm the circular switch on the ground
Sold by Elowen.

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Align the lasers by controlling the yellow orbs with Axiom Force
- Ensure that all conduits are connected

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Burn away all vines you see 
- Dunk the CPU on fire in the water, then socket it
- On the other side, open the door with Nature's Grasp
- Socket the CPU inside
- Carry and place the block(s) to keep the door open, completing the circuit 
- Force Palm the circular switch to complete the puzzle

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss   

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Find and extract the 2 CPU's - maneuver them through the smaller rectangular holes as necessary
- Socket both CPU's, then Force Palm the circular switch to complete the puzzle

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Kill all laser turrets with your Axiom Force - pick up their Power Cores with your [Kuku Pot](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=545828)
- Use the Power Cores to remove the forcefield barriers
- Pull the power cell and the 2 CPU's from behind their respective forcefields and deposit them into their respective sockets 
- Use the fans to fly up to and Force Palm the circular switch

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Crouch and Force Palm the bronze grate in the middle of the water area 
- Drop/float through the shaft avoiding the lasers
- Connect the rectangular power cell, then teleport back up
- Connect the second rectangular power cell, then Force Palm the circular switch to complete the puzzle

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Fly to and climb up the big rotating structure until you can climb inside
- Use Axiom Force to control the bronze cylindrical grates - rotate the grates until you can enter
- Ride the fans all the way to the top
- Ride the horizontal fan across to the Force Palm switch and the Artifact

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Place the laser cube in front of the orange crystal deactivate the forcefield
- Stand on the ground plate to open the floor panel - then drop inside 
- Connect the rectangular power cell 
- Power other orange crystal with the laser cube to open the door to the side of the moving platform
- In the side room - power the bigger crystals to open the forcefield
- Maneuver the rectangular power cell through the hole and slot it into its socket 
- Take the teleporter, in the same room, back up
- Force Palm the circular switch to complete the puzzle

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Climb up to the CPU, taking heed of the damaging cold - get warm from the lanterns scattered around 
- Dunk the CPU in the lava to remove the frost affecting it
- Socket the CPU
- Force Palm the circular switch to complete the puzzle

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Force Palm the bronze grate, below the nexus, while holding on to it
- Pull the CPU from the socket in the room on the other side 
- Pull the CPU out the hole above, then socket it on the ground below
- Align the lasers to the orange crystals using Axiom Force 
- Force Palm the switch to complete the puzzle

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Socket one of each of the 3 CPU's into the 3 big floating rings as necessary
- Socket the 2nd CPU into the temporary socket to remove the forcefield and retrieve the 3rd CPU
- Then remove the 2nd CPU and socket it in the ring 
- Force Palm the circle switch while holding onto the wall

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Stab into the center stone cylinder in the middle of the lava to move the smaller surrounding cylinders
- Each of the 4 Stab points on the center cylinder move different small cylinders 
- Align all 5 cylinders so that they light up yellow 
- Force Palm the circle switch after the lava drains

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Fly through the first ring with the blue light
- Then repair all 3 rings so that they look like the first one, covered in blue lights 
- Control the yellow pillars with Axiom Force - operating a pillar will move the floating platform to it
- Position the other floating platforms to be able to move the broken ring pieces - all using Axiom Force
- Force Palm the circle switch after all 4 rings are lit up

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss   

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Use Axiom Force to move the laser to activate the crystal, opening the floor
- Down below, use Axiom Force to control the giant cubes with yellow lights
- Flip the cubes to make a groove to slide the lasers
- Situate the lasers to activate the crystals
- In the room beyond - socket the power cell, then Force Palm the circular switch

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Rotate the big box with bronze grates with Axiom Force to gain access to either side
- Socket the CPU and the power cell on either side
- Socket the second power cell in the socket near the circular switch 
- Force Palm the circular switch

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss  

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Use Axiom Force to manipulate the cubes
- Turn the cubes so that all 3 lasers activate all 3 crystals

**Challenge:** Restoration - The Abyss

**Hints to Progress:** 
- Dunk the fire-affected CPU into the water, then socket it
- Move the other CPU from the center platform to the far side and socket it
- Avoid the lasers via flying, jumping, ducking etc.
- Force Palm the circular switch

**Location:** A Sanctum Core can be obtained from a secret puzzle after cleansing the Sanctum at the request of the associated Witch:
- Position yourself in front of the powered device with the blue crystal encircled with dots 
- Use Blinding Flash Concentrate Light on the blue crystal - the dots around it will begin to turn clockwise
- Deactivate Concentrate Light when passing the space in between the dots 
- Activate Concentrate Light when on a dot
- Achieving one full rotation completes the puzzle 

**Use:** Kuku Pot item crafting

**Location:** Behind the bookshelves on the upper floor in the eastern room  
**How to Access:** 
- Grab the ornamental dagger from the plaque on the upper floor
- Open the wardrobe in the corridor near the dagger
- Turn the wheel to turn the light to face the crystal, revealing another ornamental dagger
- Go downstairs, push through the false wall behind the painting under the stairs and grab the basement key
- Go upstairs into the eastern room and insert the daggers into the holes over the fireplace
- Access the basement from behind the bookshelves and down the ladder

**Behind the Passage:**
- [Cloudcart Blueprint](https://mapgenie.io/crimson-desert/maps/pywel?locationIds=546840)
